prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Warhammer 40,000 Dark Imperium inspired grimdark science-fantasy RPG setting. Terrain type: single_continent. Draw one immense fictional planetary continent as an Imperial cartographic war-zone atlas with gothic sci-fi architecture, mechanicus technical overlay, and toxic ochre atmosphere. Include hive city mega-structures, underhive slums, industrial wastelands, toxic promethium refineries, ruined manufactorum zones, void-port platforms, orbital elevator anchors, cathedral-fortress spires, inquisitorial quarantine sectors, trench war fronts, xenos-contaminated badlands, irradiated deserts, ash wastes, polluted river basins, frozen polar marches, and storm-lashed coasts. The continent must span many climates and biomes: toxic deserts, industrial ash plains, frozen wastes, acidic marshes, dead forests, volcanic forge regions, polluted deltas, cracked highlands, and coastal hive provinces. Coastline must be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, river deltas, fjords, barrier islands, sea caves, and varied landforms. Include irregular offshore islands in uneven clusters, all different sizes and shapes, some holding fortress-monasteries, refinery islands, quarantine ruins, and void-shield ports. Large detailed atlas composition, gothic compass and technical grid allowed, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
